programmes.show_description: Surrey Police officers Sean Begley and John Bryan are using Automatic Number Plate Recognition on patrol, and pull over a Romanian driver whose vehicle may be falsely registered. (Ep13)

Peppa and all her friends at playgroup dress up as different countries from all over the world.
Whose story will earn them a camp fire story telling badge and will any of them be too scary?
Zac is excited to show off his new den. But when Pip and Posy decide to make a den of their own, they accidentally destroy Zac's.
When Wingnut runs away from wolves that are attracted to his yodeling, he ends up trapped in a canyon. The PAW Patrol has to hurry to save him.
...Show. When a travelling show can't get to Builder Cove, Rubble & Crew decides to build a show of their own!
Peppa Pig goes to the park to play with friends and have new experiences.
It's the day of the duck race! When Miss Rabbit gives the sign, everyone drops their ducks in the river at the first bridge - whose will make it to the second bridge first?
Tim and Tia build a time machine to avoid confronting Dad and telling him the truth.

Hiccups: Peppa thinks it's funny when George gets hiccups from eating his breakfast too quickly, but then the hiccups start spoiling their game.

When Pip and Posy have a 'Wizards Picnic' with their friends they give in to temptation and eat Frankie's cakes without her knowing. Then ty try to cover their tracks with a fib.

programmes.show_name: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programmes.show_description: Ben stays with Naveen and Anke who moved to Sri Lanka's highlands, uncovering why they swapped city life for a simple off-grid existence miles from civilisation.

programmes.show_description: In the wilds of central Portugal, Ben meets creative homesteaders Luke and Sarah, a Maltese couple who gave up their careers to put down roots on a deserted sheep farm.

programmes.show_name: New: Death of a Prince: The...
programmes.show_description: ...Tragedy of William of Gloucester. The story of Queen Elizabeth II's cousin, who lived a life of independence, quiet rebellion and the pursuit of freedom, but suffered a premature death.
